title: BMAD Handoff Manifest
description: Dev-tool-agnostic manifest emitted by the bmad-handoff skill. Lists all ready-for-dev stories with the metadata a downstream dev tool or orchestrator needs to schedule and execute them. schemaVersion is a stable versioned interface — consumers must check it before processing.

schemaVersion.description: Semantic version of this manifest schema. Current stable: '1.0'. Consumers should reject manifests with a higher major version than they support.

generatedAt.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of when this manifest was written by the bmad-handoff skill.

projectName.description: Human-readable project name. Sourced from project-context.md or user input.

outputFolder.description: Relative path (from project root) of the folder where story files live. Useful for resolving storyFilePath values.

stories.description: One entry per story with status ready-for-dev. Sorted by wave ascending, then id ascending within each wave.

story.title: Story
story.description: A single ready-for-dev story and all metadata needed by an external dev tool to schedule and implement it.

id.description: Unique story identifier derived from the story filename stem (e.g. '2.1.stripe-integration'). Stable across manifest regenerations.

storyFilePath.description: Path to the .story.md file, relative to project root. The dev tool should read this file for full story context before starting implementation.

status.description: Story status at manifest generation time. Always 'ready-for-dev' in this manifest.

epic.description: Epic identifier extracted from the story filename (first segment). E.g. '2' from '2.1.stripe-integration.story.md'.

storyNumber.description: Story sequence number within the epic (second segment of filename). E.g. '1' from '2.1.stripe-integration.story.md'.

title.description: Human-readable story title from the first H1 or ## Story heading in the story file.

ownedScope.description: Verbatim list of file and directory paths this story is permitted to modify. Primary mechanism for parallel-conflict safety: two stories sharing any path in ownedScope must not run concurrently. Empty array means new-files-only (lower conflict risk, but runner should still validate).

wave.description: Execution wave number (minimum 1). Wave 1 = no dependencies, may start immediately. Wave N may start only after all stories in lower waves that this story depends on are complete.

parallelSet.description: Optional label grouping stories that were explicitly planned to run concurrently. Null when not annotated by the planning workflow.

dependencies.description: List of story id values that must reach 'done' status before this story may start. Empty array means no dependencies.

acceptanceCriteriaSummary.description: First three acceptance criteria from the story file, each truncated to 120 characters. Quick preview for runners; authoritative criteria are in the LOCKED ## Acceptance Criteria section of the story file.

lockedSectionsNote.description: Instruction to dev tools regarding locked story sections. Always a specific fixed string — see const value.
lockedSectionsNote.const: Sections Acceptance Criteria, Dev Notes, and Testing are LOCKED. External dev tools must not edit them. Populate only the Dev Agent Record section.

devAgentRecord.description: Reserved for the external dev tool to populate with implementation metadata (branch, commit, completion time, notes). The planning plugin always emits null here. Runners must not error if null.
